description: Configure Wireshark to perform a live capture on the primary network interface (eth0) that records ONLY ICMP traffic (pings), while completely ignoring background HTTP/TCP noise. Generate traffic by running 'ping -c 10 8.8.8.8' in a terminal. Save the capture to '/home/ga/Documents/captures/icmp_strict.pcapng'. The resulting file must contain at least 10 ICMP packets and zero non-ICMP packets.
